scripts.build: npm run build -w @northvalleyintel/assessment-shared && npm run build -w @northvalleyintel/assessment-worker && npm run build -w @northvalleyintel/assessment-web
scripts.cf:build: npm run build -w @northvalleyintel/assessment-shared && npm run build -w @northvalleyintel/assessment-worker && cd apps/web && opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.cf:preview: npm run cf:build && cd apps/web && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.cf:deploy:staging: npm run cf:build && cd apps/web && wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:deploy:production: npm run cf:build && cd apps/web && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
